message:
chore(dev): add Playwright mobile viewport testing infrastructure

Add Playwright testing capabilities for validating mobile responsiveness
across the wizard and landing pages.

New test script (apps/web/test-mobile.ts):
- Automated mobile viewport testing using Playwright
- Tests 12 key pages: landing, flywheel, and all 10 wizard steps
- Tests against 3 viewport sizes:
  - iPhone SE (smallest common mobile)
  - iPhone 14 (modern iPhone)
  - Pixel 5 (Android reference device)
- Captures screenshots for visual regression testing
- Reports console errors and failed network requests
- Generates comprehensive test results summary
- Run with: bunx playwright test test-mobile.ts --headed

Package dependencies (apps/web/package.json):
- Add playwright (^1.57.0) as devDependency
- Enables modern browser automation and testing
- Supports Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit engines

Usage patterns:
  # Run mobile tests with visible browser
  bunx playwright test test-mobile.ts --headed

  # Run headless for CI
  bunx playwright test test-mobile.ts

  # Screenshots saved to mobile-screenshots/
  # (directory is gitignored as test artifacts)

This infrastructure enables systematic verification of mobile
layouts before deployments, catching responsive design issues
that might be missed during manual testing.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
